title: Mapania longiscaposa
taxonomy: Mapania longiscaposa belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The family Cyperaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as sedge family. It is a monocotyledonous plant, which means it has one seed leaf in its seeds. The plant is classified into the genus Mapania, which consists of various species of sedges found in tropical regions. Mapania longiscaposa is classified as a species of sedge native to tropical Africa.
